title: Actually Not Bad 3D Stuff
description: This resource pack adds 3D Models for a few items,especially for Hold My Items.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e7819df61dc0d2eb40102c2d5920c47599e5be9.png) # Actually Not Bad 3D Stuff ### Warning: This is an early build.Delayed AGAIN,but some progress is made. **Btw It's kinda a filler for A3DS.**
FAQ ### Will be versions lower that 1.21.9 be supported? **-No,but if you want the LATEST 1.21.8 version.It's the most stable.I could update more on 1.21.8 too.** ### Is HMI required? **-Yes.Without it,the items could be too big,out of the screen,and things like that.** ### Does it support Punchy? **-Yes,I will add animations with it too.**
**Open for testing.** **You can make a YouTube video about it or test it alone.** Hold My Items mod is **REQUIRED**. ## Features ### 3D models for: **-Wheat** **-Spider Eye** **-Fermented Spider Eye** **-Feather** **-Popped Chorus Fruit** **-Shulker Shell** --------------------------------------------------------------------- ## Leaks/Pictures ![no](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd1ab5e0842894c742bbdf411403f4846fd820aa_0.webp) --------------------------------------------------------------------- - **Optimized 3D models for better performance** - **Adds more items in 3D that weren’t included in Actually 3D Stuff** ## News / Development Status **BETA released, full release is not available yet.** Actively working on it every day, but development is **slow**. Planned Release: **May 22, 2026** 1.21.8 or smaller versions are likely to never be supported from now on.
Terms of Use •By downloading this pack,you agree to these terms: **You may:** -Redistribute this pack while showing clear sign of credit towards me. -Add elements/things in it for personal use. -Send it to your friends modified or normally. -Put it in your modpack. **You may not:** -Upload it to third party websites without permission/credit. -Reupload to modrinth unmodified,and without credit. -Claim this pack as your own.
